title: Avoid using noqa comments
description: Avoid using noqa comments in your code to suppress warnings. They may indicate potential problems that should be addressed.
recommendation: Reconsider the use of noqa comments and address the underlying issues

noncompliant.code:
from warnings import warn
warn("Warning!", Warning, stacklevel=2)
# noqa

compliant.code:
from warnings import warn
warn("Warning!", Warning, stacklevel=2)

why_is_this_an_issue: Noqa comments may indicate potential problems that should be addressed
how_to_fix: Reconsider the use of noqa comments and address the underlying issues
